query:
INSERT INTO sectors (name, code, description, iconName, colorClass, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
('Information and Communication Technology', 'ICT', 'Covers skills in software development, networking, cybersecurity, IT support, and digital media across all ICT disciplines.', 'Monitor', 'blue', true, 1),
('Manufacturing and Engineering Technology', 'MET', 'Encompasses manufacturing processes, mechanical engineering, welding, electronics, and industrial automation skills.', 'Cog', 'orange', true, 2),
('Creative Arts and Fashion', 'CAF', 'Includes graphic design, fashion technology, hairdressing, beauty therapy, floristry, and visual merchandising.', 'Palette', 'purple', true, 3),
('Health and Social Care', 'HSC', 'Covers healthcare, nursing, social work, dental technology, pharmacy services, and related health disciplines.', 'Heart', 'red', true, 4),
('Construction and Building Technology', 'CBT', 'Encompasses civil construction, carpentry, plumbing, electrical installation, masonry, and building information modeling.', 'Building2', 'yellow', true, 5),
('Transportation and Logistics', 'TL', 'Covers automotive technology, aviation maintenance, freight forwarding, supply chain management, and logistics operations.', 'Truck', 'green', true, 6);
